name: Css

aliases.name: Declaration
aliases.comment:
A Declaration consists of (is a tuple of) a Property and a Value.
It should be a valid CSS Declaration.

    -- Example

    blueBgc = ("background-color", "lightblue") -- Declaration (Property, Value)

aliases.name: Property
aliases.comment:
It should be a valid CSS Property (as String).

    -- Example

    "background-color" : Property

aliases.name: Rule
aliases.comment:
A Rule consists of (is a tuple of) a Selector and List of Declarations.
It should be a valid CSS Rule.

    -- Example

    alertText = ("color", "red")                -- Declaration (Property, Value)
    alertBg = ("background-color", "lightpink") -- Declaration (Property, Value)

    alertRule =
      ( "span.has-alert"
      , [ alertText
        , alertBg
        ]
      )                                         -- Rule

aliases.name: Selector
aliases.comment:
It should be a valid CSS Selector (as String).

    -- Example

    "div.foo > span.bar, #baz, [disabled]" : Selector

aliases.name: Value
aliases.comment:
It should be a valid CSS Value (as String).

    -- Example

    "1px solid black" : Value

values.name: dec
values.comment: Constructor for Declaration. (,) can be used instead.

values.name: rule
values.comment: Constructor for Rule. (,) can be used instead.

values.name: style
values.comment:
Html style tag (for internal styles).

    -- Example

    style [] []

    -- <style></style>

    style [] [text "body { background-color : blue }"]

    --  <style>
    --    body {
    --      backdround-color : blue
    --    }
    --  </style>
values.type: List (Attribute msg) -> List (Html msg) -> Html msg

values.name: stylesheet
values.comment:
Helper for style tag.

    -- Example

    themedStyleSheet primaryColor bgColor =
      stylesheet
      [ rule "body"
        [ dec "background-color" bgColor
        ]
      , rule "button"
        [ dec "color" primaryColor
        ]
      ]
